leadText: Hideaway Bay (Japanese: 浦の浜 Inlet Shore) is an area located in the southern region of the Cobalt Coastlands of Hisui. It is located south of Bathers' Lagoon and accessible from the east of Aipom Hill.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Hideaway Bay is a secluded shoreline at the southernmost part of the Cobalt Coastlands. On land, the small section of shore is bordered by tall mountains at the north and west. A narrow gap through the mountains to the west allows passage on foot to and from Aipom Hill. The landscape is condensed, and mainly has trees, alive and dead.
